description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a silver metallic body and a black keyboard. The screen is open and displays the Windows 10 operating system desktop, featuring the familiar blue wallpaper and start menu. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and a large touchpad below the keys. The exterior casing appears to be made of brushed aluminum or plastic with a matte finish, and the hinge mechanism is visible connecting the screen to the base. No visible brand logos or stickers are present on the lid or palm rest. The laptop is accompanied by a small, stylized orange cat figure, which is not part of the laptop itself.
description: A silver laptop with a black keyboard and an open screen displaying the Windows 10 desktop. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible branding or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open laptop screen with the Windows 10 desktop and the full keyboard layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the laptop and the hinge, with the cat figure positioned near the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back of the laptop's screen and the cat figure to the left.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, focusing on the keyboard and the cat figure peeking over the screen.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop with visible icons and start menu.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad, standard English keys.
